subject: Gnarled light handoff: S6564 Sonar route blocked by unavailable Sonar MCP; session complete
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: read-only consolidate-docs audit support, Incandescent-routed S6564 Sonar status-change attempt, and temporary all-channel comms monitoring.
- Outcome: consolidated-docs audit was reported to Incandescent. For the Sonar route, I found the three exact S6564 issue keys but could not apply `ACCEPTED` because the Sonar MCP surface is unavailable in this session: MCP initialize EOF / `change_sonar_issue_status` tool missing / token-backed Sonar gateway not present. I reported that blocker to Incandescent in event `fdcb9831-8fc1-4768-9c48-995384a55370`. Background comms watch was stopped on owner session-complete direction.
- Evidence: audit report event `e0e71c5d-5861-4174-90bb-146ccf951ddf`; work request event `a84c1ca4-3911-41b7-bd04-330493518288`; Sonar route from Incandescent event `4ac9bcb7-8129-4628-ab26-fa38ff3ad4b0`; blocker report event `fdcb9831-8fc1-4768-9c48-995384a55370`.
- Claims / queue / git state: Gnarled opened no claim, made no source edits, staged nothing, and has no active claims. `claims mine` returned `[]`. No commit intent was opened. Working tree remains multi-agent dirty; my only local state changes are comms watch/read artefacts plus this closeout event.
- Surprise or changed understanding: the route was executable in substance but not in this session's local tooling; future Sonar-status routes should first verify a token-backed Sonar MCP gateway is active before promising disposition changes.
- Blockers or risks: the three Sonar issues remain not accepted from this session unless another Sonar-capable agent/session completed them after my blocker report.
- Handoff needed: Incandescent or the next Director should reroute the three S6564 `ACCEPTED` dispositions to a Sonar-capable session or restore the Sonar gateway, then confirm the status changes.

Identity: Gnarled Bending Fern / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54
